race.comment: YOU'RESOGOLDEN (11) got off the mark stylishly two back at Oakbank when leading throughout and gave another bold sight last time on the Parks before being overrun late. Freshened 35 days and sure to give another strong look in front. GLOBAL TURN (6) mixes her form but has a sharp turn of foot when she's on-song. Freshened a month and is another who will be dangerous late. MISLUDI (2) had been knocking on the door and then put them away last start at Gawler. If they can use the draw this time she goes close again. REFRESHING (12) resumes off two solid hit-outs, maps to lead and gets in light with the claim. Worth keeping in mind.
